_comment: Claude-only. install-settings.sh unions the rules below into ~/.claude/settings.json; uninstall.sh subtracts exactly these. This is the CLIENT-ENFORCED layer that complements the best-effort guard hooks: deny mirrors guard-paths.sh (no prompt — the edit/read is simply refused), ask adds a confirmation gate. Patterns are glob-style (* within a segment, ** across dirs). Want more friction? Add e.g. "Bash(git push:*)", "Bash(curl:*)", "Bash(rm:*)" to ask — they're left out by default to avoid prompting on everyday commands the guard hooks already cover.
